title: Unraveling the “Black Box”: Challenges and Perspectives in Elucidating Catalytic Mechanisms of Metal–Biomass Carbon Hybrids for Persulfate Activation
description: SpeakForWater Episode 2: Unraveling the “Black Box”: Challenges and Perspectives in Elucidating Catalytic Mechanisms of Metal–Biomass Carbon Hybrids for Persulfate Activation. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
